problem: Latest options-MC runs are repeatedly produced with `calibration.rv10=null` and `calibration.rv20=null`, which leaves `edge_attribution.iv_rich_vs_rv=null` and weakens/blocks explainable-edge logic. This creates a reliability/profitability blind spot: candidate quality cannot be validated against realized volatility, so high-EV setups are either under-justified or incorrectly rejected.
required_change: Implement a fail-closed realized-vol input contract for options MC: before scoring/gating, either provide fresh rv10/rv20 or emit explicit status `DATA_QUALITY_FAIL: missing_realized_vol`.

Add deterministic fallback RV computation from local underlying return history when primary RV source is unavailable, with provenance fields (`rv_source`, `rv_window_bars`, `rv_asof`, `rv_freshness_seconds`).
If fallback cannot be computed with minimum bars, keep rv fields null but hard-fail ranking/trade decision with machine-readable reason code instead of silent null propagation.
Update edge attribution logic so `iv_rich_vs_rv` is computed only when RV contract passes; otherwise set `edge_attribution.explainable=false` with explicit `explainable_reason=missing_realized_vol`.
Emit a compact telemetry counter for RV-missing events to detect data feed regressions over time.
acceptance_tests: Unit test: with valid RV inputs, artifact includes non-null rv10/rv20 and non-null `edge_attribution.iv_rich_vs_rv`.
Unit test: primary RV source unavailable but sufficient local bars exist -> fallback RV is computed, provenance fields populated, and no data-quality fail status.
Unit test: primary RV source unavailable and insufficient local bars -> artifact returns `DATA_QUALITY_FAIL: missing_realized_vol` and does not produce TRADE_READY.
Integration regression: replay latest sample window fixture; zero artifacts silently emit rv10/rv20 null without an explicit fail code.
Manual proof: provide one artifact showing primary RV source path and one showing fallback RV path, both with provenance metadata.
constraints: Do not relax existing risk/tail/stress thresholds.
Prefer fail-closed behavior over implicit assumptions when RV is missing.
Keep artifact schema backward-compatible; additive fields are allowed.
